\"Edit Prompt Slots\" and \"Browse Model: "Edit Prompt Slots" and "Browse Model Presets" are now combined as tabs inside one modal — switch via the Slots / Templates tab strip at the top.
<b>Custom Panels</b> track any state the: Custom Panels track any state the AI should monitor. Keys use lowercase_snake_case. The LLM hint describes the expected value. Fields support text, number, meter, list, and enum types. Drag the handle to reorder fields.
✗ Two API calls per message — slower tha: ✗ Two API calls per message — slower than Together mode
2. Configure your API provider and model: 2. Configure your API provider and model
3. Open the <strong>connection profile</: 3. Open the connection profile list and choose Create New
4. Give it a name such as <em>ScenePulse: 4. Give it a name such as ScenePulse Tracker
A different preset is selected temporari: A different preset is selected temporarily during tracker generation and restored afterwards.
A floating panel with each character’s i: A floating panel with each character’s inner monologue. Drag to move it and resize it from the corner.
A new version of ScenePulse is ready to: A new version of ScenePulse is ready to install.
A profile is a self-contained prompt + s: A profile is a self-contained prompt + schema bundle. Switch profiles to swap setups (e.g. Medieval Fantasy vs Pokemon) without manually editing prompts and schemas.
Active model: <code>{model}</code> — no: Active model: {model} — no bundled preset matched. Browse below or contribute one.
Active profile drives schema + prompt ge: Active profile drives schema + prompt generation.
Add your notes about this character...
After the AI responds, a separate bounde: After the AI responds, a separate bounded API call generates the tracker JSON independently.
AI did not include tracker data in messa: AI did not include tracker data in message
All retry attempts failed — open the Deb: All retry attempts failed — open the Debug Inspector for details
API authentication failed. Check your AP: API authentication failed. Check your API key in SillyTavern's connection settings.
API keys, paths, and emails are auto-red: API keys, paths, and emails are auto-redacted in this view.
Appears as if the user said it — some mo: Vises som brugeren sagde det — nogle modeller svarer bedre.
Appears as previous AI output — can rein: Som tidligere AI-output — kan styrke hukommelsen men forvirre.
Apply this template ON TOP of your curre: Apply this template ON TOP of your currently-active profile. Replaces matching prompt slots; preserves your other settings. Reversible.
Arrows show changes; the white marker sh: Arrows show changes; the white marker shows the previous value.
Automatic recovery enabled with the curr: Automatic recovery enabled with the current profile
Backend HTTP error (transient). ScenePul: Backend HTTP error (transient). ScenePulse skips tracking for this turn. If it recurs, check your API endpoint or proxy.
browsers don’t expose true GPU load. We: browsers don’t expose true GPU load. We measure FPS, frame variance, animation count, and ScenePulse-attributed paint via instrumented marks. Capture mode attaches a PerformanceObserver to attribute paint cost to specific ScenePulse components (sp:* marks); always-on stays cheap.
Cache already fresh — no refresh needed: Cache already fresh — no refresh needed
Capture in progress (continued from a pr: Capture in progress (continued from a prior inspector session). Click Stop when done.
Capture reached the 10-minute safety lim: Capture reached the 10-minute safety limit and was stopped automatically.
Captured issue records to delete: {count: Captured issue records to delete: {count}. The actual errors are not undone — only the log is cleared.
Captured network records to delete: {cou: Captured network records to delete: {count}. Future requests will still be captured.
Character profiles show appearance, outf: Character profiles show appearance, outfit, inventory, goals, and current state.
Chat changed while ScenePulse was workin: Chat changed while ScenePulse was working. Run the tracker again.
Choose the connection profile ScenePulse: Choose the connection profile ScenePulse should use when tracker data is missing:
Clear every \"already shown\" flag? Setu: Clear every "already shown" flag? Setup and suggestion dialogs will appear again after reload. Settings, profiles, snapshots, and tracker data are preserved.
Clear preset attribution. Slot overrides: Clear preset attribution. Slot overrides the preset added are kept — use Revert all to undo those too.
Clears every stored \"already shown\" fl: Clears every stored "already shown" flag so popups behave as if you were a fresh install on the next reload. Does not delete your settings or tracker data.
Clears suggestion-shown state for your a: Clears suggestion-shown state for your active model and re-runs the matcher.
Click any highlighted field to edit: Klik på et fremhævet felt for at redigere
Comma-separated list of allowed values. Example: low, medium, high, critical
Copy formatted for paste into Anthropic: Copy formatted for paste into Anthropic Workbench / OpenAI Playground
Copy only the issues list (this tab). Fo: Copy only the issues list (this tab). For a full debug bundle, use Diagnostics in the header.
Cost in USD per million input / output t: Cost in USD per million input / output tokens
Create a new profile seeded from one of: Create a new profile seeded from one of 30 bundled model templates (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Cydonia, etc.)
Create a NEW profile seeded from this te: Create a NEW profile seeded from this template. Your existing profiles are untouched.
Create panels for any state such as heal: Create panels for any state such as health, mana, reputation, or faction standing. Each field has a key, label, type, and instruction for the LLM.
Created \"{profile}\" from {preset} temp: Created "{profile}" from {preset} template — switched to it.
custom panel(s) used as the default star: custom panel(s) used as the default starting set for new chats:
Custom schema in profile \"{profile}\" i: Custom schema in profile "{profile}" is invalid JSON. The dynamic schema is being used until you fix it in the prompt editor.
Customized slots to clear in this draft:: Customized slots to clear in this draft: {count}. Press Save afterwards to commit, or Cancel to discard the revert too.
Disable anytime under Settings → Generat: Disable anytime under Settings → Generation. Your bundled prompt presets work the same either way.
Disables the animated dashboard canvas,: Disables the animated dashboard canvas, dashboard particles, and decorative blend modes. Recommended on laptops, integrated GPUs, or if the extension feels heavy.
Display name shown in the panel. Example: Display name shown in the panel. Examples: Health, Mana Pool, Street Rep
Each embedded snapshot adds ~1.9K tokens: Hvert snapshot +~1.9K. 0 fjerner. 1 for kontinuitet. Over 1 sjældent nyttigt.
Edit individual prompt sections, or appl: Edit individual prompt sections, or apply one of 30 bundled model templates (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Cydonia, Magnum, etc.) tuned to your model.
Edit the model response, then validate i: Edit the model response, then validate it before applying.
Editing the JSON schema can break tracke: Redigering kan ødelægge genereringen. Ændr kun hvis du ved.
Either (a) no instrumented component ran: Either (a) no instrumented component ran, or (b) ScenePulse wasn’t actively rendering. Trigger the slowdown DURING the capture window so the observer can attribute it.
Embed recent scene snapshots into the na: Indlejrer snapshots i konteksten. Kun Separat. Trackeren modtager altid den forrige.
Enable or disable built-in panels and in: Enable or disable built-in panels and individual fields. Disabled data is excluded from the tracker prompt and saves tokens.
Enable/disable this panel for this chat: Enable/disable this panel for this chat
Enables the “Generate NPC graph” button: Enables the “Generate NPC graph” button in the Relationship Web overlay. When clicked, makes a separate LLM call to map NPC↔NPC connections. Cached per-snapshot — no per-turn token cost. Off by default.
Enabling every panel adds about 1,500–2,: Enabling every panel adds about 1,500–2,500 tokens to each generation and may significantly increase response time.
Every scene has a pulse. Now you can fee: Every scene has a pulse. Now you can feel it.
Every tracked AI message creates a snaps: Every tracked AI message creates a snapshot. Select a timeline dot to restore that moment and compare how the scene evolved.
Existing chats keep their per-chat panel: Existing chats keep their per-chat panels untouched, but new chats started under this profile will no longer seed those panels. This cannot be undone.
Experimental: shows compact generation p: Experimental: shows compact generation provenance and captured lorebook activations below the timeline. Together mode only; stores entry metadata, not full lorebook text.
Fetch fresh pricing and context-window d: Fetch fresh pricing and context-window data from OpenRouter. Popularity rankings stay static.
Field type: text, number, meter (0–100),: Field type: text, number, meter (0–100), list, or enum
Fill in keys and LLM hints so the AI kno: Fill in keys and LLM hints so the AI knows what to track.
Five AI-generated plot directions appear: Five AI-generated plot directions appear after each update. Expand, edit, or send one to the chat.
For local models, prefer Q5_K_M+ quantiz: For local models, prefer Q5_K_M+ quantization. Consider Separate mode for models under 32B.
Found a bug or have a suggestion? Report: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Report it on GitHub:
Generate or regenerate a scene to popula: Generate or regenerate a scene to populate the inspector.
Generation cancelled — usually because y: Generation cancelled — usually because you clicked Stop, or another generation was already in flight. Not actually an error.
Give your new profile a name (e.g. \"Med: Give your new profile a name (e.g. "Medieval Fantasy" or "Pokemon"):
If the AI omits the tracker payload, Sce: Hvis AI udelader, kan ScenePulse gendanne automatisk. Kræver profil.
Image larger than 1 MB — settings file w: Image larger than 1 MB — settings file will grow
Informational only at this time. Applyin: Informational only at this time. Applying this template will not modify your prompt slots — pending community-contributed overrides for this model. Sampler hints above remain advisory.
Injected as invisible context — AI treat: Indsprøjtet som usynlig kontekst — autoritativ baggrund.
Instructions for the LLM describing exac: Instructions for the LLM describing exactly what value to return
JSON is valid and ready to apply.
JSON key — lowercase_snake_case only. Ex: JSON key — lowercase_snake_case only. Examples: health, mana_pool, reputation
JSON Schema (advanced — auto-built from: JSON Schema (advanced — auto-built from your panel settings)
keep interacting with the chat / panel f: keep interacting with the chat / panel for the rest of the window.
Key collision: {keys}. Values in differe: Key collision: {keys}. Values in different panels will overwrite each other.
Label: Etiket
Last 50 outbound requests · metadata onl: Last 50 outbound requests · metadata only · auto-redacted
Legacy prompt cleared. Slots are now act: Legacy prompt cleared. Slots are now active.
Load settings from a previously exported: Load settings from a previously exported file.
local estimate vs the ST endpoint count: local estimate vs the ST endpoint count for a known string — fails if drift > 25%
local token estimate vs the active conne: local token estimate vs the active connection max_context
long task (>50ms) — usually OK during in: long task (>50ms) — usually OK during interactions.
Manually re-trigger one-time popups for: Manually re-trigger one-time popups for troubleshooting. These bypass session/dismissal flags so you can verify dialogs render correctly without clearing state by hand.
Maximum context but significantly slower: Maksimal kontekst men langsommere og dyrere
Maximum number of scene snapshots stored: Maximum number of scene snapshots stored per chat. Set to 0 for unlimited storage. Higher values use more chat metadata space.
Models under 14B parameters or heavily q: Models under 14B parameters or heavily quantized (Q3/Q2)
More panels require more tokens and incr: More panels require more tokens and increase generation time. Disable unused panels, reduce custom fields, or lower context messages in Separate mode.
Name: Navn
Need at least 2 snapshots to show graph: Need at least 2 snapshots to show graph
Network failure (transient). Could be a: Network failure (transient). Could be a dropped connection, DNS hiccup, or CORS issue. ScenePulse will retry on the next turn.
Network timeout or API issue. Try ⟳ Rege: Netværkstimeout eller API-problem. Prøv ⟳ eller tjek loggen.
never touches your prompts, samplers, or: never touches your prompts, samplers, or generations
New issues since last opened: {count}. C: New issues since last opened: {count}. Click to inspect.
No active model detected — connect to an: No active model detected — connect to an API first.
No active model detected. Connect to an: No active model detected. Connect to an API to see preset suggestions.
No active profile — open the Profile man: No active profile — open the Profile manager first.
No API response captured for this chat y: No API response captured for this chat yet. Generate a scene first.
No character data yet. Send a message to: No character data yet. Send a message to start tracking.
No connection profiles found. Create one: No connection profiles found. Create one in SillyTavern first.
No lorebook activations captured. SillyT: No lorebook activations captured. SillyTavern may not have emitted world info activation data for this generation.
No other characters to merge into: No other characters to merge into
No outbound requests captured yet. Scene: No outbound requests captured yet. ScenePulse network calls (generate, update check, file persist) will appear here.
No profiles. Click \"New\" to create one: No profiles. Click "New" to create one.
No prompt captured for this pair: No prompt captured for this pair
No scene source trace was stored for thi: No scene source trace was stored for this snapshot. Enable the setting before the next Together generation.
No sp:* marks recorded during this captu: No sp:* marks recorded during this capture
none — slots use defaults / your edits o: none — slots use defaults / your edits only
Nothing to revert — every slot is alread: Nothing to revert — every slot is already on its default.
Off (default): show the full inner thoug: Off (default): show the full inner thought. On: vary between 1–3 sentences per character using a hash of the thought text for visual variety.
Off (default): thought panel scrolls int: Off (default): thought panel scrolls internally when many characters are present. On: cards shrink proportionally (font size, padding, portrait) so every character fits on-screen without scrolling. Scale clamps at 55% minimum to keep text readable.
Off by default. When enabled, the preset: Off by default. When enabled, the preset browser fires one fetch per session (cached 24 h, ~30 KB) and exposes a ↻ Refresh button for manual updates. Public endpoint, no auth, no telemetry.
On mobile, desktop-only visual features: On mobile, desktop-only visual features are hidden and become available again on desktop.
One click → paste-ready markdown report: One click → paste-ready markdown report combining EVERYTHING the inspector knows:
One click → runs 5 checks against the ac: One click → runs 5 checks against the actual ScenePulse code paths (no mocks):
One tracker attempt failed. Related atte: One tracker attempt failed. Related attempts are grouped with this event; open Responses for the raw output.
Open a chat before generating ScenePulse: Open a chat before generating ScenePulse.
Open Settings → ScenePulse → Prompts tab: Open Settings → ScenePulse → Prompts tab to manage profiles.
Open the Character Wiki and its graph bu: Open the Character Wiki and its graph button to view the Relationship Web.
Open the recorded chat to verify and sho: Open the recorded chat to verify and show this message.
Open the unified prompt configuration mo: Open the unified prompt configuration modal. Edit individual prompt slots (role, critical rules, language, etc.) or apply a bundled model template.
Optionally select a different preset for: Optionally select a different preset for tracker generation. (Same as current) keeps the active preset unchanged.
Panels for this chat. Changes here only: Panels for this chat. Changes here only affect this chat.
PASS / FAIL / SKIPPED. No yellow — every: PASS / FAIL / SKIPPED. No yellow — every PASS row names what it does NOT guarantee, so a green is never mistaken for the wrong promise.
Pick a name for the new profile. The \"{: Pick a name for the new profile. The "{preset}" template will seed its prompt slots and system-prompt role; panels, schema, and other settings start empty (you can copy from another profile via Duplicate later).
Pick a template to create a NEW profile: Pick a template to create a NEW profile from. The template seeds the profile with model-tuned prompt slots; your existing profiles are not touched.
Pick the character this one should be me: Pick the character this one should be merged INTO. The source character’s fields will fold into the target across every stored snapshot. The source name becomes an alias.
Popup state reset. Reload the page to sh: Popup state reset. Reload the page to show the one-time dialogs again.
POST a 1-token prompt via the active con: POST a 1-token prompt via the active connection — confirms the model responds
Preset attribution cleared. Slot overrid: Preset attribution cleared. Slot overrides remain — use Revert to undo any of them.
Profile overrides the dynamically built: Profile overrides the dynamically built JSON schema with custom JSON.
Profile overrides the dynamically built system prompt with custom text.
Prompt exceeded the model's context wind: Prompt exceeded the model's context window. Trim chat history, lower max snapshots, or switch to a longer-context model.
Public endpoint, no authorization, no te: Public endpoint, no authorization, no telemetry. You can change this later under Settings → Generation.
Quests persist across scenes and can be: Quests persist across scenes and can be collapsed independently.
Rate-limited by the API provider. Wait a: Rate-limited by the API provider. Wait a few seconds and try again. Lower temperature or shorter context can also help.
Re-shows the v6.27 OpenRouter opt-in dia: Re-shows the v6.27 OpenRouter opt-in dialog.
real-path diagnostic checks · runs once: real-path diagnostic checks · runs once on demand
Recorded by an older ScenePulse version: Recorded by an older ScenePulse version
Recovery uses a SillyTavern <strong>Conn: Recovery uses a SillyTavern Connection Profile for its separate API call. You can select an existing profile.
Regenerate ScenePulse before using this: Regenerate ScenePulse before using this state.
Remove \"{panel}\" and all its fields? T: Remove "{panel}" and all its fields? This cannot be undone.
Remove all custom panels from this profi: Remove all custom panels from this profile so they no longer seed new chats.
Remove all tracker snapshots from this c: Remove all tracker snapshots from this chat?
Fjern alle tracker-snapshots fra denne chat? Dine indstillinger bevares.
Renders the update banner regardless of: Renders the update banner regardless of current version state.
Replace this slot with its default text. Doesn't take effect until Save.
Reproduce the issue now. Capture is open: Reproduce the issue now. Capture is open — interact with the chat / panel / weather to attribute the work. Click Stop when done.
Reproduce the slowdown now — interact wi: Reproduce the slowdown now — interact with the chat / panel / weather. Click Stop when done.
Reset all ScenePulse settings to default: Nulstil alle ScenePulse-indstillinger til standard? Tracker-data bevares.
Resets injection method and profiles to: Resets injection method and profiles to defaults. Tracker data preserved.
Revert every slot to its default text. D: Revert every slot to its default text. Does not affect the role selector.
Running 5 checks against the live SceneP: Running 5 checks against the live ScenePulse code paths…
Save all ScenePulse settings (panels, to: Save all ScenePulse settings (panels, toggles, custom panels, theme) as a shareable JSON file.
Save only the issues list as a .txt file: Save only the issues list as a .txt file
Scene data is out of date: Scene data is out of date
Scene source trace is available only in: Scene source trace is available only in Together mode.
Scene source trace is disabled. Enable i: Scene source trace is disabled. Enable it in Experimental settings to capture lorebook activations for new Together generations.
Scene tension has been low for several m: Scene tension has been low for several messages. Consider introducing conflict, a revelation, or a time-sensitive event.
ScenePulse contributed a small fraction: ScenePulse contributed a small fraction of the window. Within the cheap-monitoring budget.
ScenePulse contributed less than 1% of t: ScenePulse contributed less than 1% of the capture window. No action needed.
ScenePulse dominated the capture window. Investigate the top component below — usually a single panel or overlay is responsible.
ScenePulse is waiting for the model resp: ScenePulse is waiting for the model response.
ScenePulse tracks characters, relationsh: ScenePulse tracks characters, relationships, quests, and story state automatically. This tour loads example data so you can inspect every feature.
ScenePulse used a noticeable share of fr: ScenePulse used a noticeable share of frame time. Consider disabling expensive panels (weather overlay, time-tint, dashboard sparklines).
ScenePulse uses <strong>Together mode</s: ScenePulse uses Together mode by default — the AI appends scene-tracking JSON to every response. This is fast, inexpensive, and accurate.
ScenePulse: Regenerate scene from this m: ScenePulse: Regenerate scene from this message
Schema locked and reset to default: Schema locked and reset to default
Search by name, model id, or family…: Search by name, model id, or family…
See what else is out there: See what else is out there
send a minimal generation + parse via th: send a minimal generation + parse via the live JSON schema (skipped if model echo fails)
Send more messages to build relationship: Send more messages to build relationship history
Send your first message to start trackin: Send your first message to start tracking.
Separate mode only — Together mode uses: Kun Separat — Sammen bruger STs kontekst.
settings overridden by profile (not in e: settings overridden by profile (not in effect)
Show current OpenRouter pricing, context: Show current OpenRouter pricing, context windows, and roleplay popularity while browsing templates. This is read-only and does not change prompts, samplers, or generation.
show live model data while browsing temp: show live model data while browsing templates
Showing the most recent capture (from a: Showing the most recent capture (from a prior inspector session). Click Start capture to run a new one.
Shows time, date, location, weather, and: Shows time, date, location, weather, and temperature. Use edit mode to correct values manually.
SillyTavern internal race when stop is c: SillyTavern internal race when stop is clicked during streaming. Harmless — ST is cleaning up. Not caused by ScenePulse.
Snapshot success per turn — last 20 buck: Snapshot success per turn — last 20 buckets
Some models occasionally omit tracker da: Some models occasionally omit tracker data. ScenePulse can then automatically recover it with a separate API call.
Sort the preset list. Match-first pins y: Sort the preset list. Match-first pins your auto-detected and applied presets to the top.
Starts with a current-session overview;: Starts with a current-session overview; detailed responses, issues, activity, network, performance, and configuration remain available in separate tabs.
Stock prompts — only the system-prompt r: Stock prompts — only the system-prompt role is set.
Stored in your user data folder.
Surface live OpenRouter pricing, context: Surface live OpenRouter pricing, context windows, and roleplay popularity on each preset card so you can spot alternatives while browsing templates. Read-only — never touches your prompts, samplers, or generations.
Switch to the Templates tab to apply a m: Switch to the Templates tab to apply a model-tuned preset (Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, Cydonia, etc.) — or create a new profile from one.
System prompt sent as this role: System prompt sent as this role
tells two pastes apart at a glance: tells two pastes apart at a glance
Tension has been high for a while. Consi: Tension has been high for a while. Consider a resolution beat, comic relief, or a quiet moment for characters to process.
Thank you for trying <strong>ScenePulse<: Thank you for trying ScenePulse. Your story matters — make it unforgettable.
The AI writes its normal response, then: AI skriver svar og tilføjer JSON. ScenePulse udtrækker og skjuler.
The chat changed. Reopen recovery from t: The chat changed. Reopen recovery from the current message.
The chat text or swipe branch changed. R: The chat text or swipe branch changed. Regenerate ScenePulse before using this state.
The emotional tone has been static. A sh: The emotional tone has been static. A shift in mood could re-engage the scene.
The error belongs to another swipe of th: The error belongs to another swipe of this message. Select that swipe to verify it.
The instruction sent to the model. Defin: Instruktionen sendt til modellen. Definerer datagenerering.
The latest response could not be accepte: The latest response could not be accepted.
The network log is already empty.
the prompt sent + response received from: the prompt sent + response received from the most recent generation
The response contained no JSON object. O: The response contained no JSON object. Open Responses to compare the exact prompt and raw model output.
The response was valid JSON but one or m: The response was valid JSON but one or more values did not satisfy the active tracker schema.
The result was not saved because the cha: The result was not saved because the chat changed.
The scene has settled into a pattern. Co: The scene has settled into a pattern. Consider a twist, new character entrance, or location change.
The scene topic has been repeating. Cons: The scene topic has been repeating. Consider advancing the plot or moving to a new location.
The schema defines the output structure: The schema defines the output structure the AI must produce. ScenePulse builds it automatically from your enabled Panels, Field Toggles, and Custom Panels. Manual editing is only useful for debugging or experimental tracking.
These features are under active developm: These features are under active development and may not work with all models or configurations.
These root values are persisted but igno: These root values are persisted but ignored — the active profile owns them. Cleanup is auto-run on next save; manual button is for cases where the auto-migration did not fire (e.g. imported settings backup).
This field key is reserved or invalid.
This guide configures that recovery path: This guide configures that recovery path so scene data is not lost.
This is the biggest factor in Separate m: Største faktor. 8 beskeder ~10K — fordobling fordobler. 3–4 reducerer 40–60%.
This preset only sets the system-prompt: This preset only sets the system-prompt role; no prompt slots will be modified.
this profile has a legacy \"full system: this profile has a legacy "full system prompt" set, which currently overrides the slot system entirely. Your slot edits below will be saved but won't take effect until the legacy prompt is cleared.
This removes the hand-authored full prom: This removes the hand-authored full prompt from this profile. The slot system (with any overrides + applied preset) will take effect immediately. Your slot edits in this draft are unaffected.
This rewrites every stored snapshot in t: This rewrites every stored snapshot in this chat. The source name will be kept as an alias on the target.
This section can re-trigger one-time pop: This section can re-trigger one-time popups and reset state. Locked by default so the reset button is not pressed accidentally.
This slot is auto-generated from your en: This slot is auto-generated from your enabled Panels and Field Toggles. Change those settings to customize what fields the AI is asked to produce.
This snapshot belongs to an earlier vers: This snapshot belongs to an earlier version of the chat branch.
This template uses ScenePulse's default: This template uses ScenePulse's default prompts unchanged. Its value is verified compatibility plus the sampler-hint guidance below.
This template will overwrite {count} pro: This template will overwrite {count} prompt slots in your current profile ({slots}). Your edits in other slots are preserved.
This will lock the schema editor and res: This will lock the schema editor and reset to the built-in default. Any custom schema changes will be permanently lost.
those copy ONLY the content of the curre: those copy ONLY the content of the current tab (e.g. Issues tab → only the issues list). Diagnostics gives you the full picture in one paste — best for filing a bug report.
Thought controls let you dock the panel,: Thought controls let you dock the panel, enable ghost mode, regenerate thoughts, or hide it.
Tip: prefer \"+ New profile\" if you wan: Tip: prefer "+ New profile" if you want to keep your current setup unchanged.
Together (AI appends tracker to its resp: Sammen (AI tilføjer tracker til sit svar)
Toolbar buttons control regeneration, pa: Toolbar buttons control regeneration, panels, section expansion, visual features, thoughts, and manual editing.
Tracks mood, tension, topic, interaction: Tracks mood, tension, topic, interaction, and sounds. The header badge shows the current mood.
Type <strong>/sp help</strong> to list e: Type /sp help to list every slash command.
Use <strong>Custom Panels</strong> to tr: Use Custom Panels to track health, mana, reputation, inventory, or any other state.
Use the <strong>book icon</strong> to op: Use the book icon to open the Character Wiki with every character who has appeared.
Use the <strong>pencil icon</strong> to: Use the pencil icon to edit tracker fields manually.
Use the default text for this slot.
Uses your active chat preset unchanged —: Uses your active chat preset unchanged — sampler values, model, and context size all stay the same. To customize sampler values for tracker generation, save a custom preset in SillyTavern and select it here.
Versus the per-tab Copy / Export buttons: Versus the per-tab Copy / Export buttons:
Weather overlay is off — enable it in Fe: Weather overlay is off — enable it in Features for visual effects.
When disabled, story ideas are removed f: When disabled, story ideas are removed from the tracker prompt and hidden from the ScenePulse panel.
When tracker data is missing, should Sce: When tracker data is missing, should ScenePulse run a separate API call automatically?
When you browse the preset templates, Sc: When you browse the preset templates, ScenePulse can surface live OpenRouter pricing, context windows, and roleplay popularity beside each model — so you spot alternatives at a glance.
will be permanently removed. This cannot: will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
With automatic recovery disabled, use th: With automatic recovery disabled, use the ⟳ button to regenerate missing scene data manually.
write + read + verify a probe file via /: write + read + verify a probe file via /api/files/upload
You have edits that have not been saved. Closing now will discard them.
You have unsaved slot edits. Switching t: You have unsaved slot edits. Switching tabs will discard them.
Your active connection matches this bund: Your active connection matches this bundled preset.
Your panels, schema, and other settings: Your panels, schema, and other settings are not touched. Reversible from the prompt editor (Clear preset).
